name: Slider
description: An interactive slider component for selecting numeric values within a range with keyboard support, marks, and tooltips.
usage_guidelines: Use for selecting numeric values within a defined range.
Set min and max to define selectable range.
Use step to control value increments.
Add marks for visual reference points.
Enable tooltip to show current value.
Handle onChange and onDraggingStop for value updates.

styling_info.visual_description: A horizontal track with draggable thumb. Filled portion shows selected range. Optional marks and tooltip. Supports keyboard navigation.

Do: Set appropriate min, max, and step values
Use marks for important reference points
Dont: Don't use for precise numeric input (use Input instead)
Don't set step too small (hard to control)
